page_content:
Prerequisite: HLTH625 and HLTH710, or equivalent non-BCH qualitative and quantitative methods courses.

HLTH709 Public Health Research Journal Club (1 Credit)

Discussion of recent research literature from top peer-reviewed journals focusing on cutting edge research issues related to public health. Examines public health research issues and their relationship to the conduct and application of public health practice.

Restriction: Must be in Ph.D.: Public and Community Health (Doctoral) program; or must be an advanced MPH Behavioral and Community Health student; or permission of instructor.
